/usr/bin/ar qc libeff.a CMakeFiles/eff.dir/libc_hooks/eff_libc_hooks.c.o CMakeFiles/eff.dir/libc_hooks/eff_file.c.o CMakeFiles/eff.dir/libc_hooks/eff_random.c.o CMakeFiles/eff.dir/libc_hooks/eff_time.c.o CMakeFiles/eff.dir/uartprintf.c.o CMakeFiles/eff.dir/mtimer.c.o CMakeFiles/eff.dir/time.c.o CMakeFiles/eff.dir/arch/e1x/delays.c.o CMakeFiles/eff.dir/arch/e1x/digital.c.o CMakeFiles/eff.dir/arch/e1x/init.c.o CMakeFiles/eff.dir/arch/e1x/interrupt.c.o CMakeFiles/eff.dir/arch/e1x/mmio.c.o CMakeFiles/eff.dir/arch/e1x/profile.c.o CMakeFiles/eff.dir/arch/e1x/trap.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libeff.a
